decimal_verifier_context: CONTEXT image: original full photo for display context only.
decimal_verifier_primary: PRIMARY image: best current display view for decimal inspection.
decimal_verifier_secondary: SECONDARY image: enhanced version of the same display view for decimal inspection.
localizer_context_image: CONTEXT image: ENHANCED full photo. Use this only to help visibility of the display window, not to invent a location.
localizer_support_image: SUPPORT image: structure-enhanced full photo. Use this only to highlight likely display regions and edges, not to override the original image.
localizer_candidate_crop: CANDIDATE crop: locally proposed possible display region. This is only a hint. Verify it against the full image before using it.
localizer_primary_image: PRIMARY image: ORIGINAL full photo. Use this as the source of truth for physical display location.
verifier_context_original_support: CONTEXT image: ORIGINAL full photo for support only.
verifier_primary_crop: PRIMARY image: LOCALIZED display crop under verification.
